data.name: Hentai Clicker: Emy is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Emy is streaming

Step into a naughty world of wild creatures and even wilder temptations, where Emy, your favorite collector, reacts to your every move. Click, flirt, and uncover her steamy secrets—one outfit (or creature) at a time!

🌶️ About the Game

Get ready for a spicy mix of ecchi clicker gameplay and monster girl mischief. Every click brings you closer to Emy’s erotic journey through exotic lands and seductive creatures. Collect hearts to unlock revealing outfits, cheeky animations, and voice lines that evolve as your bond deepens.

🎉 Features

🎨 Gorgeous Anime Visuals – Lush, vibrant art that brings Emy and her creatures to life.

💜 Lewd Creature Collector – Bold, cheeky, and always ready to show off her... collection.

🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Easy, satisfying, and dangerously addictive.

💗 Unlockable Outfits – From explorer gear to barely-there lingerie.

🔊 Voice Acting & Dialogues – She reacts to your clicks with moans, giggles, and wild teasing.

🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Boost your heart count and unlock hidden, steamy encounters.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’re into cheeky monster girls, naughty progression, and over-the-top fantasy fun, Emy is the perfect waifu. She’s not just collecting creatures—she’s collecting your attention.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap gets Emy hotter and closer to her next surprise.

🔓 Unlock Scenes – Use hearts to reveal outfits, poses, and wild interactions.

💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed up your progress and dive into the naughty depths of her journey.

🎉 Start Your Lewd Adventure!

Ready to follow Emy and tame more than just creatures? 🐾

Jump into Hentai Clicker: Emy is streaming and let the wild ride begin!

data.short_description: 🔞 Step into a lewd adventure with Hentai Clicker: Emy is streaming! 💜 Click to collect hearts, unlock sexy explorer outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy stunning anime art, explicit content, and dirty voice acting with your favorite naughty creature collector!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 韓文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
